programme.title: Blue Valentine
programme.desc: Dean grew up in a broken home.He never planned to build a lasting relationship until he met Cindy, with whom he fell in love at first sight.When, after a few weeks of dating, it turns out that the girl is expecting another man's child, she makes the difficult decision to get married.The couple tries to create a happy family, but over time they begin to face a serious crisis.The infatuation disappears, and everyday problems make it difficult for them to find understanding.Dean abuses alcohol and does simple physical work, unable to guarantee his wife real stability and support.The couple falls into conflicts more and more often.However, he still tries to rebuild his relationships for the sake of little Frankie.This perfectly portrayed study of the breakdown of a relationship was nominated for the Grand Jury Prize at the Sundance Film Festival.The role of Michelle Williams was nominated for an Oscar and a Golden Globe.

programme.title: It's a Wonderful Knife
programme.desc: A year ago, teenage Winnie Carruthers (Jane Widdop) had to face a psychopathic murderer, Henry Waters (Justin Long), on Christmas Eve, whose victim was also her best friend.Now it's Christmas again in the town of Angel Falls.Winnie still remembers the tragic events, although her father David (Joel McHale) and other loved ones advise her to leave the difficult past behind.A misunderstood girl on a bridge on Christmas night makes a wish - she would prefer to have never been born.He then finds himself in a nightmarish parallel universe.He discovers that without her, everything could have turned out much worse.No one recognizes her here, she is a stranger even to her family and friends.And what's worse, Henry is still alive and the mayor of Angel Falls.The teenager must regain her former life and face a bloodthirsty murderer.A bloody variation on the famous Christmas classic - "It's a Wonderful Life" by Frank Capra.

programme.title: Little Emma
programme.desc: A little girl named Emma was raised by animals.Her life is full of warmth and joy until one of her friends discovers the unpleasant truth that she was actually adopted and is not part of their family.Devastated, Emma sets out on a journey to find her loved ones.Along the way, he gathers an extraordinary team, including the clumsy inventor Żółwik Bystrzak, the ambitious scientist Edward Wilk and the brave Weasel Sancho.Together they are looking for a mysterious island which, according to legend, is inhabited by tiny people.

programme.title: Book of Dragons
programme.desc: Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs and Gobber learn the secrets of the dragons contained in the book.Gobber tells the others the story of Borek the Unlucky, who was the first to describe these unusual creatures.

programme.title: E Poi Si Vede
programme.desc: Three friends compete for an attractive job at the city hall.Federico relies on his father's connections, Fabrizio feels that he is born for this job, and Luca is always lucky.

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: After the death of her husband Gerry (Gerard Butler), Holly (Hilary Swank) falls into a deep depression.On her 30th birthday, a woman receives a mysterious parcel.The cake comes with a tape with a recorded message from... Gerry.He encourages his beloved to go out and have fun with friends.After this event, new letters regularly arrived to the young widow, each ending with a declaration of love.Gerry knew how much his wife would suffer from losing him.In letters written before her death, he encourages her to take on various challenges.Thanks to her extraordinary sense of connection with the deceased, a woman in despair undergoes specific therapy and tries to start her life anew.

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: Edward Bloom (Albert Finney), a brilliant storyteller and favorite of the neighborhood, is dying.His son Will (Billy Crudup) left home long ago, not wanting to live forever in the shadow of his father's fantastic stories.Now she returns to accompany him in his last moments.Listening to Edward's stories again, Will tries to put them together to make sense.The picture that emerges is surprisingly coherent and shows the father's life in a new light.The son realizes who his father really was.Tim Burton, one of the most eccentric creators of American cinema, created a film that captivates with its warmth, fairy-tale atmosphere and surreal poetics.The script is based on the novel "Big Fish: A Story of Mythic Proportions" by Daniel Wallace.We will see Ewan McGregor as young Edward.The atmospheric music received an Oscar nomination.

programme.title: Detective Monk: One last thing
programme.desc: Brilliant detective Adrian Monk (Tony Shalhoub) is going through difficult times.The contract to publish his autobiography was canceled, and the coronavirus pandemic intensified his fears and phobias.All this makes the master of deduction start thinking about ending his life and joining his beloved Truda.He is jolted out of his torpor by the tragedy that befalls his stepdaughter Molly (Caitlin McGee).The girl is getting ready to marry journalist Griffin Briggs (Austin Scott).However, her fiancé dies while bungee jumping.Molly is convinced that it was not an accident, but a carefully planned murder.The trail leads to the influential billionaire Rick Eden (James Purefoy).Retired Captain Stottlemeyer (Ted Levine) now works for the rich man as his security chief.Monk is assisted in the investigation by former assistant and now real estate agent Natalie Teeger (Traylor Howard) and Randy Disher (Jason Gray-Stanford), now the New Jersey police commissioner.Continuation of the cult series.

programme.title: In-laws 3
programme.desc: In a recreation center that has already passed its glory days, Wanda (Izabela Kuna) and Tadeusz (Adam Woronowicz) organize their grandson's baptism.At the family celebration, to which they invite Małgorzata (Maja Ostaszewska) and her friend, psychotherapist Grażyna (Magdalena Popławska), the former husband of the first woman, Andrzej (Marcin Dorociński), who comes from Australia with... his son Stanley (Noah Lucewicz), also appears.The atmosphere of the meeting quickly gets out of control, and old conflicts and new romances lead to surprising consequences.The local police must intervene.The third part of the comedy, with a pinch of salt, showing the class struggle.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: Dreux (Keke Palmer) and Alyssa (SZA) are like lovebirds, they have been friends for years and share an apartment.Their everyday lives suddenly turn upside down when they discover that Alyssa's boyfriend has squandered all their savings - money that was supposed to be used to pay the rent.The girls face a real challenge: in an atmosphere full of funny adventures, they must quickly find a way to get the missing amount and avoid eviction.It quickly turns out that they will be forced to take truly unusual actions to not only save their home, but also put their friendship to the test.

programme.title: Another Simple Favor
programme.desc: Emily Nelson (Blake Lively), who was sentenced to 20 years in prison, regains her freedom.She is planning a wedding on the island of Capri, and an old friend becomes her bridesmaid.A crime occurs during the ceremony.

programme.title: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: Mark Hogancamp (Steve Carell) is an illustrator, known primarily for his World War II graphics.However, he hides quite an original preference.He is fascinated by women's shoes.At home, she has a large collection of high heels, sandals, flip-flops and many other shoes.His secret is revealed unexpectedly and causes great emotions.He is attacked by a group of neo-Nazis.The injuries are so severe that they result in loss of not only memory, but also the ability to speak and move.His artistic career is ruined.The man starts therapy, hoping to regain his former shape.However, he struggles with enormous trauma and mental problems.He finally manages to find a new passion.He constructs a village in the garden, which he names Marwen.Its inhabitants, the dolls, are modeled on real people from his life.It turns out that the mockup helps him deal with panic attacks.However, he still cannot forget his experiences.Meanwhile, a new neighbor, Nicol (Leslie Mann), moves in next door.The film is inspired by the true story of artist Mark Hogancamp.The town he built is located in Kingston.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Biography of the legendary climber, BASE jumper and slackliner.Dean Potter specialized in free solo ascents, speed climbing and slacklining without belays.An important element of his activity was crossing the boundaries of style and combining disciplines: climbing, highline and BASE jumping.He was the precursor of free BASE, i.e. solo climbing using a parachute as the only protection.In Yosemite he set speed and free solo records.His activities had a significant impact on setting risk limits, which raised ethical controversies in the community.He died in 2015 in Yosemite Valley.

programme.title: Eileen
programme.desc: 1960s, Massachusetts.Eileen Dunlop (Thomasin McKenzie) works as a secretary at a reformatory for teenage boys.She lives with her widowed, alcohol-addicted father (Shea Whigham), a former police chief who suffers from paranoia and emotionally abuses her.The girl feels overwhelmed by anger and a sense of helplessness.He seeks refuge in the world of fantasy.The arrival of a new prison psychologist, the assertive and self-confident Rebecca (Anne Hathaway), causes her suppressed feelings to come to life.It seems that for the first time he has a chance for a real, deep relationship... The film's script is based on the novel by Ottessa Moshfegh.

programme.title: Freaky
programme.desc: Millie (Kathryn Newton) lives in a small American town and struggles with numerous problems.He can only count on a pair of loyal friends, Josh (Misha Osherovich) and Nyla (Celeste O'Connor).She is ridiculed by her peers and has just lost her father.To make matters worse, he becomes the target of a psychopath roaming the area, the Blissfield Butcher (Vince Vaughn).The bloody incident has surprising consequences - the girl, stabbed with an antique dagger on a moonlit night, magically switches bodies with her tormentor.In the morning he wakes up as a wanted murderer, and the Butcher can now go hunting in the form of a delicate blonde.Millie has only 24 hours to reverse the spell.Christopher Landon, the creator of "Die Another Day", pays tribute to the classics of horror cinema.He skillfully plays with convention, referring to "Halloween" or "Scream".

programme.title: The Killer's Game
programme.desc: Joe Flood, one of the best contract killers, learns about an incurable disease and places a contract on himself.However, the murderess is targeting his ex-girlfriend.Joe decides to save her.

programme.title: NO
programme.desc: Animal tamer OJ Haywood (Daniel Kaluuya) and his sister Emerald (Keke Palmer) live on a ranch in southern California where horses are trained for Hollywood film productions.They take over the business of their father, who died in suspicious circumstances.Problems are piling up for them.One day they become witnesses of inexplicable phenomena.Together with a former child star (Steven Yeun), an emcee at a family amusement park, they try to film supernatural incidents to make money by selling sensational materials.Their actions have unforeseen consequences.Director Jordan Peele made his debut in 2017 with the acclaimed thriller "Get Out!", for which he won an Oscar for the script.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: Dreux (Keke Palmer) and Alyssa (SZA) are like lovebirds, they have been friends for years and share an apartment.Their everyday lives suddenly turn upside down when they discover that Alyssa's boyfriend has squandered all their savings - money that was supposed to be used to pay the rent.The girls face a real challenge: in an atmosphere full of funny adventures, they must quickly find a way to get the missing amount and avoid eviction.It quickly turns out that they will be forced to take truly unusual actions to not only save their home, but also put their friendship to the test.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: The inhabitants of the island of Berk engage in fishing, sheep breeding and fighting dragons that regularly devastate their settlement.Frail Hiccup, the son of the tribe's chieftain, has no warrior's soul.He is a designer and inventor.However, he wants to be as good as his heroic father and, together with his peers, he takes part in classes on taming winged creatures.One day, using a launcher he constructed, he injures a representative of a rare species, a Night Fury.But no one believes him.The boy cannot kill a helpless creature.She secretly begins to care for him.She also names him Toothless.Over time, they become friends.The teenager decides to bring harmony between humans and dragons.Animation from the creators of "Shrek" and "Kung Fu Panda" nominated for two Oscars.A well-thought-out plot, excellent music and great Polish dubbing are the advantages of this wise story for the whole family.

programme.title: F+
programme.desc: A family comedy aimed at teenagers.Ted (Wells Rappaport) and Josh (James Williams Jr.) are best friends and go to the Magnet School for Math and Science together.Ted is a star student, and Josh specializes in creating gadgets that they then use to prank others.After one of such antics, they are suspended.They must be careful because the next time will result in expulsion from school.The situation becomes more complicated when they fail the most important exam.The same fate befell Penny (Lily Jane), Ted's rival.Convinced that something was wrong with the test itself, they team up with a magician and a hacker to try to destroy the results during the school dance and give themselves a chance to improve.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
programme.desc: The year is 1926. A slightly lost, nice Englishman, Newt Scamander, returns from an international research expedition, during which he had to find and describe as many species of fantastic animals as possible.He is carrying a mysterious suitcase with unknown contents.On the way he stops in New York.America is different from his homeland.It is forbidden to possess or transport magical creatures.Newt gets into trouble when it comes to light that his briefcase contains creatures considered dangerous.A researcher who is aware of their uniqueness does everything to ensure that they do not become extinct.Due to his inattention, several peculiar specimens find their way into the real world.Even more chaos is caused by a powerful force that threatens people's lives.Mr. Graves tries to erase the memories of people who witness her actions.The Muggle Jakub becomes involved in the course of events.Scamander must control the situation as quickly as possible and discover the source of the problem.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set 23
programme.desc: The program takes viewers behind the scenes of film production.In each episode, the creators discuss three cinema hits.They show how spectacular effects, impressive sets and acting performances are created.

programme.title: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: Mark Hogancamp (Steve Carell) is an illustrator, known primarily for his World War II graphics.However, he hides quite an original preference.He is fascinated by women's shoes.At home, she has a large collection of high heels, sandals, flip-flops and many other shoes.His secret is revealed unexpectedly and causes great emotions.He is attacked by a group of neo-Nazis.The injuries are so severe that they result in loss of not only memory, but also the ability to speak and move.His artistic career is ruined.The man starts therapy, hoping to regain his former shape.However, he struggles with enormous trauma and mental problems.He finally manages to find a new passion.He constructs a village in the garden, which he names Marwen.Its inhabitants, the dolls, are modeled on real people from his life.It turns out that the mockup helps him deal with panic attacks.However, he still cannot forget his experiences.Meanwhile, a new neighbor, Nicol (Leslie Mann), moves in next door.The film is inspired by the true story of artist Mark Hogancamp.The town he built is located in Kingston.

programme.title: Avenue of the Giants
programme.desc: California.For years, 74-year-old Herbert Heller hid from his family his traumatic experiences during World War II and his stay in the Auschwitz-Birkenau camp, where he was sent at the age of twelve, and three years later he attempted to escape.All this changes when he meets Abbey (Fisher), rejected by his peers, whose own difficult experiences prompt him to open up.A moving, healing friendship develops between a man and a teenager.The story is based on the true memories of Herbert Heller, a former concentration camp prisoner who settled in the USA after the war.

programme.title: Happened Schnirch
programme.desc: Brno, the night of May 30-31, 1945. Gerta Schnirch (Barbora Váchová), the daughter of a Nazi and a Czech mother, together with her several-month-old child, is - like almost all Germans - expelled from the city.The exhausting procession, marked by violence and humiliation, later called the death march, ends near the border with Austria.From the temporary camp, Gerta goes to work in the Moravian countryside.She manages to save her own life and that of her daughter.After five years he returns to Brno.No one is waiting for her in the city, but she still can't leave it.She becomes entangled in a vortex of further turbulent changes.A film adaptation of Kateřina Tučková's debut novel, "The Expulsion of Greta Schnirch", touching on the difficult topic of Czech and German guilt, revenge, forgiveness and national identity.

programme.title: Happened Schnirch
programme.desc: Brno, the night of May 30-31, 1945. Gerta Schnirch (Barbora Váchová), the daughter of a Nazi and a Czech mother, together with her several-month-old child, is - like almost all Germans - expelled from the city.The exhausting procession, marked by violence and humiliation, later called the death march, ends near the border with Austria.From the temporary camp, Gerta goes to work in the Moravian countryside.She manages to save her own life and that of her daughter.After five years he returns to Brno.No one is waiting for her in the city, but she still can't leave it.She becomes entangled in a vortex of further turbulent changes.A film adaptation of Kateřina Tučková's debut novel, "The Expulsion of Greta Schnirch", touching on the difficult topic of Czech and German guilt, revenge, forgiveness and national identity.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Hot-tempered New York detective Terry Hoitz (Mark Wahlberg) dreams of his name going down in police history.Unfortunately, he is punitively delegated to office work.His dim-witted partner Allen Gamble (Will Ferrell) is not keen on catching criminals and would rather spend his days behind a desk.As a result, those with completely opposite characters do not like each other.However, both of them share a feeling of inferiority because they are still in the shadow of the local police celebrities: P.K.Highsmith (Samuel L. Jackson) and Christopher Danson (Dwayne Johnson).The opportunity to take their place comes sooner than they might expect.When the famous duo is killed in action, Terry and Allen face the opportunity of a lifetime.They are on the trail of a scandal involving multimillionaire David Ershon (Steve Coogan).If they manage to find evidence of a crime and catch the culprits, they will gain recognition and decorations.However, if they fail, they will face professional degradation.

credits.actor: reporter na konferencji prasowej - Andrew Secunda
